name: Date
description: Detects standalone dates in MM/DD/YYYY or DD/MM/YYYY format with a 4-digit year in the range 1900–2099. Matches dates without requiring an explicit 'Date of Birth:' context label. Low severity — bare dates are ambiguous and may not represent personal information without surrounding context.

metadata.note: Companion to personal.date_of_birth. Use that rule for higher-confidence context-anchored matches (with 'DOB:' or 'Date of Birth:' prefix). This rule catches bare dates without a label.
